content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：卡斯托爾EP·於暴風中，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：卡斯托爾EP·於暴風中
那位尊貴的客人曾望著卡斯托爾滿懷希望的背影，於月光下輕輕呢喃宿命的預言：「他會走出去，會在暴風中拚命地掙扎。那讓他高飛的，也必將讓他墜落。」

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Castor’s EP: In the Storm》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Castor’s EP: In the Storm》 
That noble guest once gazed at Castor's hopeful back and softly whispered the prophecy of fate beneath the moonlight: "He will go out, and struggle desperately in the storm. What lifts him to fly high will surely bring him down."

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio

**01.暗巷-The Dark Alley-**

那些潛伏著黑暗的、幽深又狹窄的小巷，總是承載著許多命運轉折的時刻。重逢、爭吵、決裂，乃至暴力、欺凌、謀殺。
所幸的是，今日的故事沒有發生後半部分血腥的場面，但誰又能說前者所招致的，不是真正的悲劇呢？

The alleyways coiled like serpents in the gloom, narrow and suffocating, their cobbled stones steeped in the echoes of fate’s cruel whims. Reunions, quarrels, partings—even violence, cruelty, and murder.
Fortunately, today’s tale did not descend into the latter bloodshed. But who could say that the former did not lead to a tragedy far more profound?"

**02.風箏-A Pitiful Kite-**

飛啊，飛啊，鳥兒用那雙翅膀對抗著沉重的引力，不斷攀升、攀升，穿過一股又一股亂流與漩渦，向著越來越高的地方飛去。
然而他不知道，他的腳上一直系有一條無形的絲線，他或許從不曾真正成為飛鳥，縱使飛翔，也不過是一隻可憐的風箏。
現在，風箏線收緊了。

Up, up the bird struggled, wings beating against the cruel weight of the world, each desperate thrust carrying him further into the storm’s embrace. 
Yet he did not know an invisible thread had always been tied to his foot. Even in flight, he was but a pitiful kite.
And now, the string was tightening."

<:wish:1356084702468899117> 以上就是本次OST的全部曲目囉~
The above are all the tracks of this OST~
<@1131790839291596841> HI 可以跟你反應個問題嗎? 熔朵的超限爆發 有時語音會沒聲音，是不是BUG?
